steps.title: Find possible total range
steps.content: Each tray has between 50 and 60 cookies, so for 4 trays the total $T$ satisfies $$4 \times 50 \le T \le 4 \times 60$$ which simplifies to $$200 \le T \le 240$$.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B (205)
steps.content: Backsolving — testing choice B (205): Check if 205 lies within the allowed range. Since $$200 \le 205 \le 240$$ is true, 205 cookies can be achieved with four trays (for example, three trays of 50 and one tray of 55). That matches choice B — B is correct.
